text.str: THIS DOCUMENT CONTAINS VALUABLE PROPRIETARY TO RAFAEL.
THE RECIPIENTS OF THIS DOCUMENT SHALL NOT DISCLOSE ITS CONTENTS IN
WHOLE OR IN PART TO ANY THIRD PARTY UNLESS OTHERWISE AGREED BY RAFAEL.
THIS DRAWING SHALL BE USED WITH ITS MODEL FOR COMPLETE PRODUCT
OD=33. W.T=6.35 MM AIRCRAFT, GEN_1111-1, ASTM A312
UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED (WHEN IN CONFLICT, THIS PARA. OVERRIDES TITLE
BREAK SHARP EDGES ~0.2X45 °, EXTERNAL EDGES MAY BE PERFORMED AS R0.2 +0.2
SAMPLING METHOD FOR ALL OTHER DIMENSIONS & REQUIREMENTS:
Z0 SQUEGLIA, INDEX VALUE 2.5%. PER PS-TILDOCS#172373.
100% INSPECTION OF * MARKED DIMENSIONS AND/OR PARAMETERS.
NUMBER OF * MARKED DIMENSIONS AND/OR PARAMETERS IS:4
STAINLESS STEEL PASSIVATION TREATMENT PER PS-111.21 (RAFDOCS-434847)
APPLY 1 LAYER OF PRIMER COAT-EPOGAL COATING, EPOXY PRIMER FOR GALVANIZED
STEEL, TAMBOUR CODE No. 649-050 OR EQUIVALENT PRIMER COATING APPROVED
APPLY TWO LAYERS OF COATING OF EPOXY POLYAMIDE ACCORDING
APPLY TWO LAYERS OF POLYURETHANE TOP COAT ACCORDING
TO MIL-C-83286 OR MIL-PRF-85285. TOP COAT COLOUR ACCORDING
TOTAL THICKNESS OF DRY COAT OF PAINT: 150-230 MICRON
ATTACHMENT OF C.O.C AND OTHER DOCUMENTS SPECIFIED IN THE PURCHASE ORDER
